    simp only [linearInvo, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ⊢
    have h1 := hS.1
    have h2 := hS.2.1
    have h3 := hS.2.2
    constructor
    · nlinarith
    · nlinarith
  · intro x hx
    simp only [T, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Subtype.forall, Prod.forall] at hx ⊢
    obtain ⟨⟨x1, x2, x3⟩, hS⟩ := x
    simp only [linearInvo, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ⊢
    have h1 := hS.1
    have h2 := hS.2.1
    have h3 := hS.2.2
    constructor
    · nlinarith
    · nlinarith

apply Fintype.card_congr
  use fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ ↦ ⟨⟨y, x, -z⟩, by
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h ⊢

  use fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ ↦ ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, by
    simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    have hx := h.2.1
    have hy := h.2.2
    have hz := h.1

  use fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ ↦ ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, by

apply Fintype.card_congr
  use fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ ↦ ⟨⟨y, x, -z⟩, by
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h ⊢
    exact ⟨by linarith [h], h.2.2, h.2.1⟩ ⟩
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ hT

    nlinarith
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ hU
    simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hU
    simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    simp only [linearInvo, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq]
    nlinarith

apply Fintype.card_congr
  use fun x ↦ linearInvo k x
  constructor
  · intro x hx
    simp only [T, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Subtype.forall, Prod.forall] at hx ⊢
    obtain ⟨⟨x1, x2, x3⟩, hS⟩ := x
    simp only [linearInvo, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ⊢
    have := hS.1
    have hx3 : x3 > 0 := hx
    have : -x3 < 0 := by linarith
    have : x1 - x2 + x3 > 0 := by
      nlinarith
    nlinarith
  · use fun x ↦ linearInvo k x
    constructor
    · intro x hx
      simp only [T, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Subtype.forall, Prod.forall] at hx ⊢
      obtain ⟨⟨x1, x2, x3⟩, hS⟩ := x
      simp only [linearInvo, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ⊢
      have := hS.1
      have hx3 : x1 - x2 + x3 > 0 := hx
      have : -x3 > 0 := by
        nlinarith
      nlinarith
    · intro x
      simp only [Function.LeftInverse, Function.RightInverse]
      rw [← linearInvo_sq k]
      simp

  use fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ ↦ ⟨⟨y, x, -z⟩, by
